Pattern around 'choice': 108 lessons share this theme. Example: For other:easy tasks, gemini-2.5-flash is a reliable, cost-effective choice (verified in production at ~100% quality).

Pattern around 'data': 5 lessons share this theme. Example: gpt-4o-mini demonstrates superior consistency for complex coding tasks and data structure implementations.
